ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Continued To Sep-09-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 613
MINI MINUTES: Case called for trial. Both sides present as heretofore.

Court orders case transferred to Dept. 304, Hon Richard A. Kramer, for settlement conference purposes only.

Case continued for voluntary settlement conference on September 3, 2002, 10:30 a.m., Department 304.

Case continued for trial on September 9, 2002, 09:30 a.m., Department 613.

Court orders all parties present.

Notice by Plaintiff counsel and by lead defense counsel, Susan A. Ogdie of Felice, Brown, Eassa & McLeod.
